1.name: Fey Sight
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 40

1.name: Folderol
1.description: Determine whether a spoken statement was a lie.

2.name: Darkling Trickery
2.description: Create effects normally associated with faeries and glamours.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 40

2.name: Fae Sight (V20)
2.description: Sense any form of magic unrelated to ghosts or undead.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 455-457

3.name: Goblinism
3.description: Gain intuitive underground direction sense and summon goblins to reshape stone.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 40-41

3.name: Aura Absorption
3.description: Remove supernatural resonance from an object.

4.name: Chanjelin Ward
4.description: Place symbols that confuse and disorient those who encounter them.

4.name: Faerie Wards
4.description: Create protective wards based on fae symbology that distort perception and intent.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 41

5.name: Riddle Phantastique
5.description: Speak riddles that compel listeners to stop and ponder them exclusively.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 41

6.name: Stone Travel
6.description: Tunnel through earth and stone with supernatural ease.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 41

6.name: Steal the Mind
6.description: Temporarily remove memories and knowledge from a victim.

7.name: Earth Sword
7.description: Cause spikes or stone to erupt from nearby structures and strike a target.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 41

7.name: Absorb the Mind
7.description: Permanently steal Ability ratings from a victim.

8.name: Basilisk's Touch
8.description: Turn a victim into stone with a touch.
references: Storytellers Handbook to the Sabbat (2nd) Pg. 41

8.name: The Grandest Trick
8.description: Become a mortal for up to one day.
